name: qa-marketplace
description: Autonomous QA sweeps for running web apps — functional bug hunts, measured responsive defect hunts, exhaustive UX reviews, and persona-driven scenario runs, each with an adversarial verification pass.

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: Four multi-agent QA sweeps of a running web app: /qa:bug-sweep (functional bugs), /qa:layout-sweep (measured responsive defects), /qa:ux-review (exhaustive design and UX review), and /qa:drive-app (persona-driven scenario runs that catch workflow failures the others cannot). Each fans out specialist agents, then puts the serious findings through a fresh adversarial verifier that tries to refute them, so the report you read is short and trustworthy.
